structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-02-03 AZ Is Home Program
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-02-03 09:07:03-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

 

Effective Today,  The Arizona IDA has announced the continuation of the Arizona is Home Program in rural Arizona:

1.	The new funding for Arizona Is Home 2025 is in place.
2.	The ability to make New Reservations begins today, February 3, 2025.
3.	We will keep the respective county income limits at 100% AMI until further notice.


Program Highlights

*	Income limits apply
*	Primary Residence only
*	4% DPA assistance
*	FHA, VA, USDA, and Conventional
*	Non-occupant co-signors/co-borrowers are NOT allowed in the Arizona Is Home program.
*	Borrower must be a First-time homebuyer or meet the Veteran’s exception*

 

*A Veteran is a person as defined in 38 USC § 101 who served in the active military, naval, or air service, and was discharged or released therefrom under conditions other than dishonorable.

 

Geographic Restrictions

The Program is only available in the following Arizona Counties: Apache, Cochise, Coconino, Gila, Graham, Greenlee, La Paz, Mohave, Navajo, Pinal, Santa Cruz, Yavapai, and Yuma.  Please confirm the subject property address is in one of the qualifying counties prior to reserving funds.
 

County
 

100% AMI
 

Apache
 

$66,100
 

Cochise
 

$70,700
 

Coconino
 

$85,900
 

Gila
 

$68,800
 

Graham
 

$75,400
 

Greenlee
 

$83,000
